summary: First-iteration full-stack test of Globtier Dealer Intelligence app. Backend pytest 15/15 PASSED (auth, dealer CRUD/RBAC, group dashboard, overview, benchmarks, excel export/import). Frontend Playwright covered login (admin+viewer), dealers list (7 rows incl. test dealer), dealer profile with KPI tiles+charts+tabs, groups list, group dashboard with 4 outlets and showroom/workshop owned/leased totals, benchmarks (3 rows), import page, role-based sidebar (admin sees Users+Excel Import, viewer does not), and logout. All flows working.

issues: Two harmless 401 errors logged in console on initial /login load — likely AuthContext calling /api/auth/me without token. Cosmetic only; consider suppressing 401 on initial bootstrap to keep console clean.

action_items: Optional: suppress initial /api/auth/me 401 console error when unauthenticated (call only if token exists).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: register endpoint has no role-gating — anyone can self-register an 'admin' role. Consider restricting role assignment to admin-only or default to viewer regardless of body.role.

import/dealers: no validation of required columns; malformed Excel silently inserts rows with empty fields (TEST_Imp_1 row was created with 0 sales/no monthly_sales). Add column validation + error reporting.
No brute-force lockout or rate limiting on /api/auth/login (playbook expects lockout after 5 fails).
Cookie set with secure=False — fine for preview but should be True in production.
_calc_dealer_metrics is recomputed on every list call; consider caching or computing on write for large dealer counts.
test_credentials: admin@globtier.com/admin123, business@globtier.com/business123, viewer@globtier.com/viewer123, dataentry@globtier.com/data123 — all working
seed_data_creation: Seed automatic on backend startup: 4 users, 3 benchmarks (2023/24/25), 5 single dealers + 1 group (Regalia, 4 outlets). Test added 1 imported dealer 'TEST_Imp_1' (cleanup pending — main agent may purge TEST_ prefixed dealers if desired).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — covers all main endpoints. Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Login button uses text 'Sign in' (no type=submit). Sidebar nav text: Overview/Dealers/Group Dealers/Benchmarks/Excel Import/Users. Logout button text 'Sign out'. TEST_ prefixed dealers may exist in DB from import test.
